properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 23/19


TWO SCIENTIFIC ROCKETS WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM MARCH 23RD TO APRIL 10TH, 2019. 
THE LAUNCH WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 1900-0030 UTC, IN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD.
MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREAS:

AREA 1:
A. 69-27.0N 16-07.0E
B. 69-23.0N 16-09.0E
C. 69-18.0N 16-03.0E
D. 69-17.6N 15-59.0E
E. 69-21.0N 15-47.0E
F. 69-24.4N 15-43.0E

AREA 2:
A. 69-31.7N 15-33.0E
B. 69-33.0N 15-41.0E
C. 69-29.0N 15-47.0E
D. 69-28.0N 15-40.0E

AREA 3:
A. 69-34.5N 15-57.0E
B. 69-34.5N 16-05.0E
C. 69-30.0N 16-05.0E
D. 69-30.0N 15-57.0E

AREA 4:
A. 72-50.0N 09-20.0E
B. 72-40.0N 12-00.0E
C. 71-50.0N 13-00.0E
D. 71-20.0N 11-50.0E
E. 71-30.0N 10-00.0E
F. 72-10.0N 08-50.0E

AREA 5:
A. 71-40.0N 16-00.0E
B. 72-10.0N 14-20.0E
C. 73-00.0N 14-20.0E
D. 73-20.0N 16-00.0E
E. 73-00.0N 18-00.0E
F. 72-10.0N 18-00.0E

REFER NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 5/19
